steps.title: Identify the defining feature
steps.content: The example illustrates agglomeration through firms that “locate near one another”—establishing that the blank must describe geographic clustering.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the signal
steps.content: “Concentrate” means to gather in one location, directly capturing how firms cluster geographically to achieve the benefits described. Recur, dissipate, and terminate do not convey geographic clustering. That matches choice C — C is correct.
